stories.title: Takeaways: Spurs close out Timberwolves
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned from the Wolves-Spurs series.

stories.title: Spurs oust Wolves in rout, set up clash with OKC
stories.summary: Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper accounted for nearly half of the Spurs' scoring in a series-clinching 139-109 win over the Wolves to set up a Western Conference finals clash with the Thunder.

stories.title: Pistons' huge 2nd half buries Cavs, forces Game 7
stories.summary: The Pistons won their fourth elimination game in the 2026 NBA playoffs on Friday, beating the Cavs to force a Game 7.

stories.title: Wilson torches Sun for 45 as Aces win 3rd straight...
stories.summary: A'ja Wilson set a WNBA record with her fifth career 40-point game, dominating the Sun with 45 points on 15-of-18 shooting in the Aces' 101-94 win Friday night.

stories.title: Smalley, McNealy atop crowded PGA leaderboard
stories.summary: Newcomers Alex Smalley and Maverick McNealy grabbed a share of the lead at the PGA Championship on Friday, but seven major champions are within four shots of the lead.
